# XActions

> ⚡ The Complete X/Twitter Automation Toolkit — Scrapers, MCP server for AI agents (Claude/GPT), CLI, browser scripts. No API fees. Open source. By nichxbt.

XActions automates X/Twitter without needing API access. It provides 60+ browser scripts, a Puppeteer-based scraping engine, an MCP server for AI agents, a CLI tool, and a full Express.js web dashboard with PostgreSQL backend.

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/nirholas/XActions
- Author: https://github.com/nirholas
- Full documentation for LLMs: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nirholas/XActions/main/llms-full.txt

## Key Capabilities

- Scrape profiles, followers, tweets, media, bookmarks (Twitter, Bluesky, Mastodon, Threads)
- Mass unfollow, detect unfollowers, follower monitoring
- Auto-like, auto-follow, keyword-based growth automation
- Post tweets, threads, polls, schedule content
- MCP server for Claude Desktop and AI agent integration
- Algorithm cultivation / thought leader training
- Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol support
- Browser extension (Chrome/Edge)

## Tech Stack

- Node.js >= 18, ESM modules, Express.js, Puppeteer, Prisma (PostgreSQL), Bull (Redis), Vitest, Socket.io, Stripe
